creator: arcadiy@ivanovy.net
text:
https://twitter.com/arcivanov/status/681960018313347077

Upgraded from 10.1-STABLE to 10.2-STABLE
Boot failed, no GEOM device found.
Boot log showed ICH7R controller as "<mass storage, RAID>" and "(no driver attached)"

Switching ICH7 OROM from RAID to IDE modes allowed GEOM RAID mount and booting.

The machine is Dell Vostro 200.
